case_title: D'AMBROSIA, JOHN L VS NOCON, ARNEL

docket_entries.description: SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF JAN-29-2004, GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT NOCON, ARNEL
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,500.00 FILED BY D'AMBROSIA, JOHN L AS TO DEFENDANT NOCON, ARNEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-23-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
OTHER RULINGS: THE AMOUNT OF $100 IS TO BE WITHHEL D FROM EARNINGS EACH PAY PERIOD.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NOCON, ARNEL
ACKNOWLEDGEMENT OF RECEIPT OF ORIGINAL CLAIM OF EXEMPTION; NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMP- TION; NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION,
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT NOCON, ARNEL HEARING SET FOR JAN-29-2004 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
COPY OF THE RULING SENT TO PARTIES AND THE SHERIFF DEPT. (CERTIFIED COPY).
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,658.64 AS TO DEFENDANT NOCON, ARNEL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF D'AMBROSIA, JOHN L RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NOCON, ARNEL $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,572.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT NOCON, ARNEL
